title: Radha Krishna, Vrindavan, Hinduism Secrets - Indresh Upadhyay #apratihast #krishnaupadesh
description:
Full Podcast - https://yt.openinapp.co/cyg1x

In this special Radha Krishna, Hinduism Secrets & Ancient Mysteries episode, Ashutosh Pratihast chats with Indresh Upadhyay about the secrets of Hinduism, the ancient mysteries, and the epic Mahabharat.

As part of our Janmashtami celebration, we chat with Indresh about the hidden secrets of Hinduism and the many mysteries the religion has to offer. From the secrets of Ayurveda to the existence of ancient aliens, Indresh shares his insights on this special episode of Hinduism Secrets, Ancient Mysteries & Untold Stories of Shri Radha Krishna

"Unlock the profound secrets of Hinduism and delve into the enigmatic world of ancient mysteries with Indresh Upadhyay & Ashutosh Pratihast, as we celebrate Janmashtami, the birth of Lord Krishna. Join us for a special Janmashtami exploration with the esteemed scholar, Indresh Upadhyay. In this captivating journey, we unveil the untold stories of the Mahabharata, one of the greatest epics in history.

🕉️ Discover the hidden wisdom of Hinduism.
🌟 Unearth ancient mysteries that have fascinated generations.
📖 Dive deep into the epic tales of the Mahabharata.
🙏 Celebrate the spiritual essence of Janmashtami.

Join us on this enlightening Janmashtami Special, where ancient legends come to life and the spiritual heritage of Hinduism shines brightly. Don't miss this opportunity to gain profound insights and celebrate the wisdom of our ancient scriptures.

Subscribe to our channel for more enlightening content and stay tuned for this exclusive Janmashtami special event with Indresh Upadhyay."
